from typing import List


def dedupe_tags(tags: List[str]) -> List[str]:
    seen = set()
    result = []
    for tag in tags:
        if tag not in seen:
            seen.add(tag)
            result.append(tag)
    return result


def process_user_emails(emails: List[str]) -> List[str]:
    unique_emails = list(set(emails))
    return [e.lower() for e in unique_emails]


def get_distinct_categories(products):
    return list({p["category"] for p in products})
